---
name: CAPA
about: File a corrective action or preventative action (CAPA) report
title: '[CAPA]: '
labels: ["CAPA", "triage"]
assignees: ''

---
<!-- [13485:5.4.2b,8.2.1] -->
*This template is used to file a corrective action or preventative action (CAPA) report as specified by [CSC-QMS: SOP-016](https://github.com/GSTT-CSC/CSC-QMS)*

*Please complete all of the following fields*

**Type**
*Is this a corrective action or a preventative action? (delete as appropriate)*

Corrective/Preventative action

**Datix ID**
*If this CAPA has an associated Datix report, please enter the Datix ID here.*

**Description**
*Please describe the issue. e.g., No contact details provided as part of product information*

**Immediate Actions**
*Describe any immediate actions needed to ensure safe control of the product/QMS process etc.* 

**Risk Assessment**
<!-- [13485:4.1.2b]-->
*Perform a risk assessment to identify risk controls*
<br>- Description:
<br>- Causes: 
<br>- Harm: 
<br>- Severity: 
<br>- Likelihood: 
<br>- Risk: 
<br>- Risk control: 
<br>- Residual Likelihood: 
<br>- Residual Risk: 

**Root Cause**
*Please describe the root cause. e.g., Loss of information during development*

|Number|Cause|Action|
|---|---|--|
||||

**Audit Source**
*Please describe whether this CAPA was raised as a result of an internal or external audit, e.g., This CAPA was raised following Internal Audit [date], Audit Ref: [ref number]*

**Potentially Adverse Implications**
*Describe any potentially adverse implications to the action e.g., Release of product version and process update.*
*Please refer to the CSC PR.021 Change management SOP for details on what significant changes may require contacting the notified body.*

**Time Frame for Completion**
<br>*Confirm the time frame within which the actions must be completed, confirmed by the QMO.*
<br>*High Risk - Life threatening/ life altering consequences - Consult CSC PR.014 for Incident Reporting timeframes*
<br>*Low Risk - Not life altering - 1 month*
